mapper.select: SELECT id, supplier_name, quantity, kwh_equivalent, certificate_year, unit_price, total_amount, status, expected_date, completed_date, purchase_month, expiry_date, is_void, notes, supply_type, location_id, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM procurements WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO procurements( supplier_name, quantity, kwh_equivalent, certificate_year, unit_price, total_amount, status, expected_date, notes, supply_type, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{supplierName}, #{quantity}, #{kwhEquivalent}, #{certificateYear}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{expectedDate}, #{notes}, #{supplyType}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE procurements SET supplier_name = #{supplierName}, quantity = #{quantity}, kwh_equivalent = #{kwhEquivalent}, certificate_year = #{certificateYear}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, status = #{status}, expected_date = #{expectedDate}, completed_date = #{completedDate}, purchase_month = #{purchaseMonth}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}, is_void = #{isVoid}, notes = #{notes}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE procurements SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity),0) AS total_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN expiry_date <= #{deadline} THEN quantity ELSE 0 END),0) AS expiring_within30_days FROM procurements WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND is_void = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(kwh_equivalent), 0) FROM procurements WHERE YEAR(completed_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(completed_date) = #{month} AND status = 'COMPLETED' AND is_void = 0 AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT supply_type AS supplyType, COALESCE(SUM(kwh_equivalent), 0) AS kwh FROM procurements WHERE YEAR(completed_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(completed_date) = #{month} AND status = 'COMPLETED' AND is_void = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY supply_type
